snippet.description:

♪Stream the Full Song Here♪
iTunes: https://music.apple.com/lk/album/randu-kekka-single/1554254827
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/album/0Y6auZvOwCS5gGPDmBHLlP
Deezer: https://www.deezer.com/en/album/208947122
Yandex Music: https://music.yandex.com/album/13951995/track/78197046
Amazon Prime Music: SOON
Hungama: SOON

Song Lyrics: 
ඉස්මතු වෙන්නේ ඔයා ගැනයි
තාම හිත පතුලේ
විස්තර හෙව්වේ පුරුද්දටයි
ඒක වරද මගේ
සම්බන්දේ අපි අතරේ නැතුවත් යලි ඇරඹෙන්නේ 
අමතක වෙන්නැති අතීතේ මට විතරද වද දෙන්නේ 

රණ්ඩු කෙක්ක මාත් එක්ක
හේතු හොය හොය පැටලිච්ච
කාලෙ රැක්ක පෙමත් එක්ක
හීන අඬනව පැරදිච්ච

හැමදාමත් මහ රෑ - මා ඇහැරූ ඇමතුමක්
ඒ කාලේ ලැබුණා - හිත පුරවා සැනසුමක්
නොහිතූ තැනක තියා - හැමදේටම නැවතුමක්
ඔබ ඇයි ගියේ කියා - තව මට නෑ තේරුමක්

යන්නට හිතුන නිසා - නැති වරදක් පැවරුවත්
ඔය හිත රවට්ටනා - එක වෙන්නෑ පහසුවක්
කිව්වට නෙවෙයි කියා - මා ඔබගේ කවුරුවත්
දන්නෝ දනී ඉතින් - එය නම් මහ රැවටුමක්

Song Lyrics: 
ඉස්මතු වෙන්නේ ඔයා ගැනයි
තාම හිත පතුලේ
විස්තර හෙව්වේ පුරුද්දටයි
ඒක වරද මගේ
සම්බන්දේ අපි අතරේ නැතුවත් යලි ඇරඹෙන්නේ 
අමතක වෙන්නැති අතීතේ මට විතරද වද දෙන්නේ 

රණ්ඩු කෙක්ක මාත් එක්ක
හේතු හොය හොය පැටලිච්ච
කාලෙ රැක්ක පෙමත් එක්ක
හීන අඬනව පැරදිච්ච

හැමදාමත් මහ රෑ - මා ඇහැරූ ඇමතුමක්
ඒ කාලේ ලැබුණා - හිත පුරවා සැනසුමක්
නොහිතූ තැනක තියා - හැමදේටම නැවතුමක්
ඔබ ඇයි ගියේ කියා - තව මට නෑ තේරුමක්

යන්නට හිතුන නිසා - නැති වරදක් පැවරුවත්
ඔය හිත රවට්ටනා - එක වෙන්නෑ පහසුවක්
කිව්වට නෙවෙයි කියා - මා ඔබගේ කවුරුවත්
දන්නෝ දනී ඉතින් - එය නම් මහ රැවටුමක්

දැවීලා තැවීලා හා
නැසීලා Love  වීලා මා
සෑදීලා පේවීලා කෙරුව
පෙමක වීලා තෘතීක මා
අවරට බැලුම් බලාං
හිටගෙන ලපං ගහාං
පද නැති බෙරේ පලාගෙන
ගෑණී යන්ට ගියා මල කෝලාං

ඒ රන් කද නම් මගේ රන් එතනා
ඒ රන් කලවම් උන රන් කෙවිටා
රන්රඹුටන් කඩන් එනවා
රන්වන් පාටයි සමණලයා....

උඹගේ රට හාවා .,
මේ මට කොලේ වහලා
ඌ පැන පැන ආවා..,
ඒ ගුටි කන මූණා .,
ගොටුකොළ කන්නා.,
දැන් ඇති වද දුන්නා...

මේකනම් පිස්සුවක් බන්
හැදිලා කැස්සක් බන්
වහිනවා වැස්සක් බන්
මට දැනෙන්නේ මේකනම් පිස්සුවක් බන්

මේකනම් පිස්සුවක් බන් //
මේකනම් මේකනම් මේකනම් පිස්සුවක් බන්

හිටවලා ඇති දැන් බතල කටින්
කරලම තියෙන්නේ පවම කයින්
දිරවන් නැති උබේ අමුතු ලයින්
වැඩි පුර කිව්වොත් දෙන්නේ පයින්
හය හත වෙනකොට දාගෙන කඩේ
බොරුහිල තිබ්බට උලුදුයි වඩේ
නාටක පෙන්නන් ආවට නඩේ
මැද්දට පැනලා කියපන් "අඩේ"

මුලින්ම දැක්කම පෙම් හමුවීම
ආංගානියේ තුරුලට වීම
ඇලීම ගැලීම වෙලීම තැවීම
අඩ අඩ බලපං දෙවෙනි ඉනිම
බදින්නේ ගහං තොරාං
ණයයිලු හතර වරාං
ලැබුනොත් දේව වරාම්
නුඹ දක්කං යන්නම් මගේ කොරාං

ඒ රන් කද නම් මගේ රන් එතනා
ඒ රන් කලවම් උන රන් කෙවිටා
රන්රඹුටන් කඩන් එනවා
රන්වන් පාටයි සමණලයා....

දැවීලා තැවීලා හා
නැසීලා Love  වීලා මා
සෑදීලා පේවීලා කෙරුව
පෙමක වීලා තෘතීක මා
අවරට බැලුම් බලාං
හිටගෙන ලපං ගහාං
පද නැති බෙරේ පලාගෙන
ගෑණී යන්ට ගියා මල කෝලාං

ඒ රන් කද නම් මගේ රන් එතනා
ඒ රන් කලවම් උන රන් කෙවිටා
රන්රඹුටන් කඩන් එනවා
රන්වන් පාටයි සමණලයා....

උඹගේ රට හාවා .,
මේ මට කොලේ වහලා
ඌ පැන පැන ආවා..,
ඒ ගුටි කන මූණා .,
ගොටුකොළ කන්නා.,
දැන් ඇති වද දුන්නා...

මේකනම් පිස්සුවක් බන්
හැදිලා කැස්සක් බන්
වහිනවා වැස්සක් බන්
මට දැනෙන්නේ මේකනම් පිස්සුවක් බන්

මේකනම් පිස්සුවක් බන් //
මේකනම් මේකනම් මේකනම් පිස්සුවක් බන්

හිටවලා ඇති දැන් බතල කටින්
කරලම තියෙන්නේ පවම කයින්
දිරවන් නැති උබේ අමුතු ලයින්
වැඩි පුර කිව්වොත් දෙන්නේ පයින්
හය හත වෙනකොට දාගෙන කඩේ
බොරුහිල තිබ්බට උලුදුයි වඩේ
නාටක පෙන්නන් ආවට නඩේ
මැද්දට පැනලා කියපන් "අඩේ"

මුලින්ම දැක්කම පෙම් හමුවීම
ආංගානියේ තුරුලට වීම
ඇලීම ගැලීම වෙලීම තැවීම
අඩ අඩ බලපං දෙවෙනි ඉනිම
බදින්නේ ගහං තොරාං
ණයයිලු හතර වරාං
ලැබුනොත් දේව වරාම්

ඒ රන් කද නම් මගේ රන් එතනා
ඒ රන් කලවම් උන රන් කෙවිටා

දැන් ඇති වද දුන්නා...

මේකනම් පිස්සුවක් බන්
හැදිලා කැස්සක් බන්

The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice One of the most successful reality TV formats in the world. Extremely successful in 180 countries. 
SRI LANKA’S NEWEST TELEVISION EXPERIENCE - The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice is an international reality television singing competition franchise of Dutch origin. It is based on the reality singing competition The Voice of Holland, which was originally created by Dutch television producer John de Mol. The show's format features five stages of competition: producers' auditions, blind auditions, battle rounds, knockouts (since 2012), and live performance shows.

A combined 438 singers have won The Voice, The Voice Kids, The Voice Teens and The Voice Senior in 145 countries/regions. Each winner is given a recording contract, a monetary prize, and a title as that nation's "Voice". 

Official Facebook Page - https://www.facebook.com/TheVoiceSriLankaOfficial
Official Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/thevoicesrilanka

snippet.title: Karnan | Kandaa Vara Sollunga Lyric Video Song | Dhanush | Mari Selvaraj |  Santhosh Narayanan
snippet.description:
#Karnan | #KandaaVaraSollunga Lyric Video Song | #Dhanush | #MariSelvaraj | #SanthoshNarayanan | #KalaipuliSThanu | #VCreations

Song: Kandaa Vara Sollunga
Vocals: Kidakkuzhi Mariyammal, Santhosh Narayanan
Lyrics: Mari Selvaraj
Composed by Santhosh Narayanan

Special thanks to Thekkambatti S Sundarrajan, Ramji Audios - Madurai
Recorded by Santhosh Narayanan, Sai Shravanam, R K Sundar
Recording Assistants : Pranav Muniraj, NSR Sukumar
Recorded at Future Tense Studios, Prism Sound Studios, Resound India
Tapes: ‘4 Idiots’ group
Thiruvannamalai Parai Kuzhu
Arranged, Programmed by Santhosh Narayanan
‘Geoshred’ Sarangi: Navneeth Sundar
Mixed and Mastered by Sai Shravanam at Future Tense Studios
Musicians Coordinator: Meenakshi Santhosh
Karnan Chants Chorus : Arivu, Yogi Sekar, Kottur Victor, Kalyanaraman, Purushothaman,
Pranav Muniraj, Deva A, ‘Pei’ Vijay S, Sathya Thamizharasan, Karthik Raja Karuppusamy

#Karnan Tamil Movie:
Star Cast : Dhanush , Lal , Yogi Babu , Nataraj (Natty ), Rajisha Vijayan
Director : Mari Selvaraj
Music Composer: Santhosh Narayanan
Producer: Kalaipuli S Thanu
Banner: V Creations
Director Of Photography: Theni Eshwar
Editor: Selva RK
Art Director : Tha Ramalingam
Action Choreography: Dhilip Subbarayan 
Dance Choreography: Sandy
Sound Design : Suren G – S Alagiakoothan
DI Colorist : Prasad and Babu
DI Line Producer: Krishna Rao V
Stills: Amir
Make up : Nellai V Shanmugam – R Raja
Costume : Perumal Selvam
Publicity Design : Kabilan Chellaih
Production Executive: Venkat Arumugam
PRO: Riaz K Ahmed – Diamond Babu

Lyrics animated by - SFTS MEDIA

Lyrics:

Not fathered by the Sun God; 
Nor witnessed by the Moon God; 
Born to a forsaken woman, this child - 
Fed and raised on famine, this child...

(Chorus)
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!

There's the big old Banyan Tree;
Perched upon its tallest branch, 
Though it is all alone -
The lone parakeet sings his name!

(Chorus)
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!

All these countless temples in the village, 
All these countless Gods in the temple, 
And not a single idol of Karnan - 
But he's part of our family! 

(Chorus)
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!

Never laid eyes on any armour (Kavacham);
Never adorned with any ornaments (Kundalam), either;
Would you look how he wields the sword! 
None of his foes survived.

(Chorus)
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!

Audio Label: Think Music

© 2021 SPI Music Pvt. Ltd.

snippet.title: Supun Perera - Obamai Aaloke (ඔබමයි ආලෝකේ) ft. Dilmin Perera [Official Music Video]
snippet.description:
Available on iTunes/Spotify/Deezer & all other platforms 
Apple Music - http://apple.co/3axZuVz
Spotify - https://spoti.fi/3dxfEjM

Supun Perera - Obamai Aaloke  [Official Music Video]

Artist - Supun Perera
Composed & Produced by - Dilmin Perera
Lyrics - Dilmin Perera
Additional Synths - Sanuka Wickramasinghe 
Mixed & Mastered by - Vinod Melpitiya @ Brick House Studios 
Additional Supervision - Senanga Dissanayake 
Directed by - Hasinth Pathirana
Video Production - Off Road Pictures UK
Starring - Tashi Kalidasa
Choreography- Dewni Chirathma (Dede)
MUA - Saduni Wijesooriya (Aweera)
Sponsorship Coordinator - Ruvini Seresinhe 
Vocals Recorded @ Infinity Studios 
Poster Designing  - Hirusha Pathirana @ OffRoad Pictures. 

Sponsors 
Maliban Lemon Puff

Hair & Beauty Partner -  Aweera Hair & Beauty
Men’s Costume Partner - Jump Clothing
Ladies Clothing Partner - Kelly Felder 
Official Photography - Photostream Art Gallery

-Special Thanks-
Manoj Hettiarachchi 
Bhagya Wickramage 
Milinda Siriwardena
Sameera Weerasinghe 
Roshan Premathilake 
Asanka Weerasinghe 
Senanga Dissanayake 
Meneka Anthony

Lyrics 
මේ ප්‍රේම චායාවේ 
මල් පිපෙන හෝරාවේ
සිප ගත්ත රෑ යාමේ සොඳුරේ

ඒ සිහින රේඛාවේ 
ඉගිලෙන්න සැනසිල්ලේ 
‍රෝසමල් යහනාවේ සොඳුරේ

ආදරේ සිතේ සාගරේ වගේ
මට කීව කීව පෙම් කතන්දරේ
ශෝකගිම් නිවී ප්‍රේමියේ මගේ
තාරුකා වගේ දිලෙයි අහසේ...

ඔබමයි ආලෝකේ ඔබමයි මා සිහිනේ
ඔබමයි මා ජීවේ..ප්‍රේමියේ...//
සංසාර සරනාවී ප්‍රේමයේ සනසාවී
ආදරෙන් මට ලංවී මාගේ කෝල මනමාලී...

මේ ප්‍රේම චායාවේ - සිත රැඳුණු මදහාසේ
ඔබේ රුවමයි මට සිහිවෙන්නේ
ඔබෙ නෙත් දුටුවාවේ හදේ මල් පිපුනාවේ
ප්‍රේමරැල් නැගුනාවේ හදේ..

ආදරේ සිතේ සාගරේ වගේ
මට කීව කීව පෙම් කතන්දරේ
ශෝකගිම් නිවී ප්‍රේමියේ මගේ
තාරුකා වගේ දිලෙයි අහසේ...

ඔබමයි ආලෝකේ ඔබමයි මා සිහිනේ
ඔබමයි මා ජීවේ..ප්‍රේමියේ...//
සංසාර සරනාවී ප්‍රේමයේ සනසාවී
ආදරෙන් මට ලංවී මාගේ කෝල මනමාලී...

ආදරේ සිතේ සාගරේ වගේ
මට කීව කීව පෙම් කතන්දරේ
ශෝකගිම් නිවී ප්‍රේමියේ මගේ
තාරුකා වගේ දිලෙයි අහසේ...

සංසාර සරනාවී ප්‍රේමයේ සනසාවී
ආදරෙන් මට ලංවී මාගේ කෝල මනමාලී...

#obamaiaaloke #supunperera #2021

snippet.title: Project Cobra: Serlahkan Kuasamu | Garena Free Fire Malaysia
snippet.description:
Dari jalanan ke gelanggang tinju, kehidupan Shirou telah terbalik dengan kekuatan Cobra yang mengalir dalam darahnya. 🐍

Bertahan, berjuang atau mati mencuba. Adakah anda akan menyertai pertarungan dengan Shirou?

Dengarkan Lagu Cobra di Spotify Music - legenda dalam pembuatannya: https://bit.ly/2ZAe5JP 🎵
--
From the streets to the rings, Shirou's life has been turned upside down with the power of Cobra running through his veins. 🐍

Survive, fight or die trying. Will you join the fight with Shirou?

Listen to the Cobra Song on Spotify Music - legend in the making: https://bit.ly/2ZAe5JP 🎵

snippet.title: Soorarai Pottru - Deleted Scene 01 - Maara All Lost | Sudha Kongara | Suriya | 2D Entertainment
snippet.description:
Get a glimpse of Surya’s  “Soorarai Pottru” deleted scene 01. Amazon’s original movie Surya’s “Soorarai Pottru” is about Maara (Surya), a boy from a remote village dreaming of having his airline service.

Find out the challenges he has to face in this journey to see his dream come true. 2D Entertainment presents a deleted scene as a part of a 100th-day promotion that you shouldn’t miss.

Watch the full movie now. Also, to watch more deleted scenes from the action-drama, subscribe to 2D Entertainment.

Watch Now Soorarai Pottru - https://amzn.to/SooraraiPottru
only on Amazon Prime Video

snippet.title: CHAKRA - Tamil Sneak Peek | Vishal | Shraddha Srinath | Yuvan Shankar Raja | VFF
snippet.description:
Presenting the Tamil Sneak Peek  of CHAKRA; starring Vishal; Directed by M.S. Anandan; Music Composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja.

Vishal starrer "Chakra" is an action-thriller movie releasing on 19th February.

MS Anandan's debut film stars Vishal, Shraddha Srinath and Regina Cassandra. 'Chakra' talks about cybercrime and online scams. 

Vishal, as Chandru, is an officer who is on a mission to expose this evil act.

Here's a Tamil sneak peek on the VFF channel that you shouldn't miss! Subscribe to Vishal Film Factory for more updates. 

Chakra movie is coming soon!

Checkout The Trailer in Other Languages👇
Telugu Trailer ▶ https://youtu.be/N8B3chilPxI
Malayalam Trailer ▶ https://youtu.be/S9Q3qfIuehU
Kannada Trailer ▶ https://youtu.be/GhAe_8rykbg

#Chakra #ChakraTrailer #WelcomeToDigitalINDIA #Vishal #YuvanShankarRaja #ShraddhaSrinath #ReginaCassandra #MSAnandan #VFF

Starring : Vishal, Shraddha Srinath, Regina Cassandra, Robo Shankar, K.R.Vijaya, Srushti Dange, Manobala

Written And Directed by : M.S. Anandan 
Producer : Vishal 
Cinematography : Balasubramaniem 
Music : Yuvan Shankar Raja 
Editing : Thiyagu 
Stunts Choreography : Anl Arasu

snippet.title: VJ Chithra's Kaalangal Video Song | Calls | J Sabarish, Infinite Pictures | Chithu
snippet.description:
Calls is a Indian Tamil (Neo noir) Crime thriller, Socio drama film written and directed by J.Sabarish, starring V.J. Chitra in the lead role. Delhi ganesh, Nizhalgal ravi, R. Sundarrajan, Devadarshini, Vinodhini Vaidyanathan, Jiva Ravi, Sriranjani, Thidiyan play supporting roles. 

Singers - Ajaey shravan, Padmaja
Lyrics - K.Bhuvana, Jegadeesan,Dr. Nandhudasan

Producers
S.Jayakumar, J.kaveri Selvi, J.Sabarish

Tamilnadu Distribution          Rockfort Entertainment

Written and Direction, 
Cinematography, 
Edit - J.Sabarish B.Sc., D.F.Tech.,

Music - Thameem Ansari

Art - Ramu thangaraj, Jana Prathap

Costume - R. Balaji

Sound mix - R. Krishnamoorthy D.F.Tech.,

All Songs  & Background score  Composed & Arranged By : Thameem Ansari.A
Veenai : Anjana 
Flute : Sathish 
Keyboard Player : Barath
Violin : Kevin

snippet.title: Zack Snyder's Justice League | Official Trailer | HBO Max
snippet.description:
In Zack Snyder's Justice League, determined to ensure Superman’s (Henry Cavill) ultimate sacrifice was not in vain, Bruce Wayne (Ben Affleck) aligns forces with Diana Prince (Gal Gadot) with plans to recruit a team of metahumans to protect the world from an approaching threat of catastrophic proportions. The task proves more difficult than Bruce imagined, as each of the recruits must face the demons of their own pasts to transcend that which has held them back, allowing them to come together, finally forming an unprecedented league of heroes. Now united, Batman (Affleck), Wonder Woman (Gadot), Aquaman (Jason Momoa), Cyborg (Ray Fisher), and The Flash (Ezra Miller) may be too late to save the planet from Steppenwolf, DeSaad, and Darkseid and their dreadful intentions.

Subscribe: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxYouTube

Be the first to know more:
HBO Max: https://hbom.ax/YT
Like HBO Max on Facebook: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxFacebook

snippet.title: දිමුත්, දසුන් නායකයින්; සීමිත පන්දුවාර සංචිතය නම් කරයි
snippet.description:
මාර්තු 3 වැනිදා සිට ආරම්භ වීමට නියමිත ශ්‍රී ලංකා - බටහිර ඉන්දීය කොදෙව් සංචාරය සඳහා සහභාගී වන ශ්‍රී ලංකා T20 සහ ODI සංචිත නම් කර තිබෙනවා. එක්දින සංචිතයේ නායකයා ලෙස දිමුත් කරුණාරත්නත්, විස්සයි විස්ස සංචිතයේ නායකයා ලෙස දසුන් ශානකත් තෝරාගෙන තිබෙනවා.

තවත් තතු - http://bit.ly/ThePapareCricket

Subscribe now  ✔️ http://thepapare.com/youtube

#WIvSL #SriLankaCricket #TPCricket

snippet.title: Harith Wijeratne - Hemin Sare Piya Wida (හෙමින් සෑරේ) | Blind Auditions | The Voice Sri Lanka
snippet.description:
The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice One of the most successful reality TV formats in the world. Extremely successful in 180 countries. 
SRI LANKA’S NEWEST TELEVISION EXPERIENCE - The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice is an international reality television singing competition franchise of Dutch origin. It is based on the reality singing competition The Voice of Holland, which was originally created by Dutch television producer John de Mol. The show's format features five stages of competition: producers' auditions, blind auditions, battle rounds, knockouts (since 2012), and live performance shows.

A combined 438 singers have won The Voice, The Voice Kids, The Voice Teens and The Voice Senior in 145 countries/regions. Each winner is given a recording contract, a monetary prize, and a title as that nation's "Voice".

snippet.title: බිරිද වයසයි,විරූපියි කියලා කමෙන්ට් දාපු මිනිස්සුන්ට ගායක දිනේෂ් තරංග දුන්නු සංවේදී පිලිතුර. Dinesh
snippet.description:
අදටත් මා නිසාම හුස්ම ගන්නා නුඹ...

snippet.title: Watch NASA’s Perseverance Rover Land on Mars!
snippet.description:
Watch an epic journey unfold on Thursday, Feb. 18 as our Perseverance rover lands on Mars. To reach the surface of the Red Planet, the rover has to survive the harrowing final phase known as Entry, Descent, and Landing.
 
Only then can the rover – the biggest, heaviest, cleanest, and most sophisticated six-wheeled robot ever launched into space – search Jezero Crater for signs of ancient life and collect samples that will eventually be returned to Earth.
 
Tune in to a live video feed of key landing activities and commentary from Mission Control at NASA’s Jet Propulsion Laboratory.

localized.description:
Watch an epic journey unfold on Thursday, Feb. 18 as our Perseverance rover lands on Mars. To reach the surface of the Red Planet, the rover has to survive the harrowing final phase known as Entry, Descent, and Landing.
 
Only then can the rover – the biggest, heaviest, cleanest, and most sophisticated six-wheeled robot ever launched into space – search Jezero Crater for signs of ancient life and collect samples that will eventually be returned to Earth.
 
Tune in to a live video feed of key landing activities and commentary from Mission Control at NASA’s Jet Propulsion Laboratory.

en.title: Watch NASA’s Perseverance Rover Land on Mars!
en.description:
Watch an epic journey unfold on Thursday, Feb. 18 as our Perseverance rover lands on Mars. To reach the surface of the Red Planet, the rover has to survive the harrowing final phase known as Entry, Descent, and Landing.
 
Only then can the rover – the biggest, heaviest, cleanest, and most sophisticated six-wheeled robot ever launched into space – search Jezero Crater for signs of ancient life and collect samples that will eventually be returned to Earth.
 
Tune in to a live video feed of key landing activities and commentary from Mission Control at NASA’s Jet Propulsion Laboratory.

Song Lyrics: 
අමතකයිලු මාව දැන් එයාට
දුරස් වෙලා ටිකෙන් ටික හිනාව
ජීවිතේම බාර දුන් කෙනාව 
අතහරින්න දැන් ඇවිත් වෙලාව 

මා එක්ක  හිටියා
දැන් ඇතියි වගේ නම්
යන්න අවසරයි ඔයාට රත්තරන් 
යන්න අවසරයි ඉතින් 

මාව දාලා යන්න ඕනෙමයි කියා
නොකිවුවාට දැනෙනවා හැබැයි ඔයා
ඔයාගේ ඇස් දෙක
දිහා බලන් මම
කියන්නේ කොහොමද 
යන්න යන බව

ඔයාගේ අත්දෙක
අයිති නැ මට
ඒ නිසා මම නතර වෙන්නද
ආදරෙයි රත්තරන් 
හැබැයි සත්තයි මම

මං තරම් ආදරේ
කවුරුවත් නැ ලොවේ...//
එහෙව් මාව තමයි ඔබව
නැතිකර ගන්නේ
මේ ආත්මයේ..
ඔයාගේ අත්දෙක
අයිති නැ මට
ඒ නිසා මම නතර වෙන්නද
ආදරෙයි රත්තරන් 
හැබැයි සත්තයි මම

මලක් මෙන් පරිස්සම් 
කලා මං ඔබ ඉතින්...//
එහෙව් මාව තමයි ඔබව
නැතිකර ගන්නේ
මේ ආත්මයේ..
ඔයාගේ අත්දෙක
අයිති නැ මට
ඒ නිසා මම නතර වෙන්නද
ආදරෙයි රත්තරන් 
හැබැයි සත්තයි මම

Song Lyrics:
ඉනේ ගැටෙන දිග කොණ්ඩේ රටා අතුරලා
ලතාවකට ඇය එන්නේ දෙපා හොල්ලලා
සුදු බෝල මූණෙ ආලකම් බලා
ඇස් දෙක දුවන්නෙ නෑ ඉවත්වෙලා
දඟ කතා මල්ල
කනට මියුරු පැණි මතක් කලා
සුදු මුදු ඇඟිල්ලෙ මුදුව එල්ලලා
හදවතේ කෙල්ල සහෙට ගන්න ඕන ඉල්ලලා

ඔය රූ සොබා හද ඇතුලේ තබා
දොරඟුලු ලා දමා ගත්තා සෙවනැල්ලේ ඉඳලා
පසුපස බෝ දෙනා ආවත් පා සිනා
දොඩමලු වෙන්න එපා කෙල්ලේ මගෙ කොල්ලෝ කියාලා
සුදු බෝල මූණෙ ආලකම් බලා
ඇස් දෙක දුවන්නෙ නෑ ඉවත්වෙලා
දඟ කතා මල්ල
කනට මියුරු පැණි මතක් කලා
සුදු මුදු ඇඟිල්ලෙ මුදුව එල්ලලා
හදවතේ කෙල්ල සහෙට ගන්න ඕන ඉල්ලලා

හිඳිමූ සැපේ අපි දෙන්නා අපේ
ආදර ලොකයේ හැමදා සැනසිල්ලේ වැටිලා
දුක සංකා කැපේ ඔබ දකිනා හිතේ
අමතක වෙන්න එපා කොල්ලා මම ඔබගේ කියලා
සුදු බෝල මූණෙ ආලකම් බලා
ඇස් දෙක දුවන්නෙ නෑ ඉවත්වෙලා
දඟ කතා මල්ල
කනට මියුරු පැණි මතක් කලා
සුදු මුදු ඇඟිල්ලෙ මුදුව එල්ලලා
හදවතේ කෙල්ල සහෙට ගන්න ඕන ඉල්ලලා

දුක සංකා කැපේ ඔබ දකිනා හිතේ
අමතක වෙන්න එපා කොල්ලා මම ඔබගේ කියලා
සුදු බෝල මූණෙ ආලකම් බලා
ඇස් දෙක දුවන්නෙ නෑ ඉවත්වෙලා
දඟ කතා මල්ල
කනට මියුරු පැණි මතක් කලා
සුදු මුදු ඇඟිල්ලෙ මුදුව එල්ලලා
හදවතේ කෙල්ල සහෙට ගන්න ඕන ඉල්ලලා

ඔය මුවේ සිනහවයි
හදවතින් හැමදා පැතුවේම
තරහ නෑ මගෙ නෙතින්

සත්තමයි මැරුණත් මගෙ පපුව

snippet.title: Simran Emotional Scene || Best Scence || Heart Touching Emotional Scene || Best Heart Touching
snippet.description:
Simran Emotional Scene || Best Scence || Heart Touching Emotional Scene || Best Heart Touching

Simran Bagga (born Rishibhala Naval; 4 April 1976), known mononymously as Simran, is an Indian film actress, producer, classical dancer, model, and television personality. She has predominantly appeared in Tamil and Telugu films, as well as a few films in Hindi, Malayalam, and Kannada. She is well noted for her dancing and acting skills in the Indian film industry. In her long movie career, she has won three Filmfare Awards South, one Tamil Nadu State Film Award for Best Actress, three Cinema Express Awards, two Kalaimamani Awards, several regional awards and nominations.

Although Simran initially aspired to become a fashion designer, she accepted offers to join the Indian film industry, which came as a result of her fame as an anchor in the show Superhit Muqabla. Having acted in a few Hindi films, she later achieved her first success with Tere Mere Sapne (1996) alongside Arshad Warsi. Subsequently, she made her debut in South Indian cinema through the Malayalam film Indraprastham (1996) and Kannada film Simhada Mari (1997). In the same year, she debuted in Tamil through V. I. P. (1997) and was followed by a string of commercial successes in her early career. In 1999, Simran received critical praise in the Tamil films Thulladha Manamum Thullum (1999) and Vaali (1999), establishing herself as the most successful actress in Tamil cinema at the time. At the peak of her career she agreed to play the role of an antagonist in Parthen Rasithen (2000) and a suffering woman from a premarital agreement in Priyamaanavale (2000), both went on to become commercial and critical successes.

Simran received her first Filmfare Award for Best Tamil Actress for Kannathil Muthamittal (2002),[3] as the mother of an adopted 9-year-old daughter. Simran had also appeared in two comedy films alongside Kamal Haasan; Pammal K. Sambandam and Panchathantiram, both released in 2002. In Telugu, Simran starred in a series of commercially successful films; Samarasimha Reddy (1999), Kalisundam Raa (2000) and Narasimha Naidu (2001), and for latter both, she received Filmfare Award for Best Telugu Actress nomination. Simran left the film industry following her marriage with her childhood family friend Deepak Bagga in 2004.[4] In 2008, she made a comeback to Tamil cinema with Vaaranam Aayiram, where she played a mother and a wife to the characters played by Suriya and won the Filmfare Award for Best Supporting Actress.[5]

snippet.title: 3D PEN VS GLUE GUN! 17 Cool Hacks And Crafts For You
snippet.description:
We’ve tried every 3D pen and hot glue craft we could imagine, and here’s what we created. Aren’t 3D pens just amazing? You can create anything you can think of, make it colorful and give it purpose. Today, we wanted to experiment with something new, and we wanted to show you some amazing hacks you can create at home. But first, let’s try some experiments with hot glue. Why buy a bath mat when you can make a colorful one with glitter using hot glue? To make it look store-bought, use a printed pattern and some greaseproof paper on top. Sometimes charging your phone becomes a nuisance, so today, we show you how to create a stand for your phone using a 3D pen. But for those of you who want to get craftier, we show you how to make a beautiful romantic ring from scratch using a 3D pen. Watch until the end to discover some fantastic tricks and crafts you’ll adore. 

Timestamps: 

1:06 — How to fix a broken wood piece 

2:25 — DIY ring 

2:48 — Beautiful, DIY jewelry holder 

4:15 — DIY hair comb 

6:53 — Cute DIY earrings 

9:03 — DIY fake nails

snippet.title: Chinese New Year’s decorations, goods and snacks！明日除夕，挂灯笼、贴对联、备好年货过大年啦！丨Liziqi Channel
snippet.description:
Please  subscribe to 【李子柒 Liziqi 】Liziqi Channel on YouTube if you like my videos: https://goo.gl/nkjpSx 
#李子柒#Liziqi#lýtửthấ#ChineseCuisine #ChineseFood

Tomorrow is Chinese New Year’s Eve! 
We put up lanterns, paste Spring Festival couplets, and do shopping and stock up for the new year!
Another year is dawning!
Chinese New Year’s decorations, goods and snacks are ready for the big day.
Melon seeds, peanuts, candied haws, Sanzi (fried dough twists), and fried prawn crackers, to name a few.
A big hug for those who can’t get together with their families back in the hometown.
I’m convinced that infinite hope and luck
are sure to come in 2021!
一年又到头啦！
年俗、年货小零食做起来准备过大年喽～
瓜子 花生 糖葫芦、馓子 虾片走起来！
给所有没回家就地过年的小伙伴们大大的拥抱
我相信，生生不息的希望和好运
一定会和2021一起到来

snippet.title: #Vadivelu இந்த அக்யூஸ்ட் எங்கயாச்சி பாத்து இருக்கீங்களா? இவரா!! இவரை எல்லாம் புடிக்க முடியாது சார்
snippet.description:
#VadiveluNonStopComedyHD #Manivannan #CheenaThaana001 #CheenaThaana007 #ManivannanMovieComedyVideoHD #PrasanaMovieComedyVideoHD

#VadiveluComedy எவளோ நேக்கா கொத்து விட்டுபோய்ட்டான், மனுஷனுக்கு புது புது வியாதியா வருதே நா என்ன பண்ணுவேன் | Best Comedy Video HD| CheenaThaana

Cheena Thaana 001 is a 2007 Tamil action comedy film starring Prasanna and Sheela. It's a remake of the 2003 Malayalam action-comedy film, C.I.D. Moosa.

Plot
Tamizharasu (Prasanna) wants to become a cop, but the arrogant police officers Inspector Parameshwaran (Manivannan) and AC Gowrishankar (Riyaz Khan) ensure that he does not succeed. Meanwhile, he discovers a plot to assassinate the Governor (Visu) by the terrorist Gulshan Baba (Kazan Khan), and he complains it to Gowrishankar, but discovers that he is also a member of the plot. So he forms a detective agency and starts cracking the plot, and how he succeeds in it with the help of his father (Delhi Ganesh), his father's Friend (Ilavarasu) and, of course, with his friend Cheenichamy (Vadivelu), who is also a thief, forms the rest of the story.

Cast
Prasanna as Tamizharasu
Sheela as Priya
Vadivelu as Seenichamy
Manivannan as Inspector Parameshwaran
Delhi Ganesh as Head Constable Ezhumalai Tamizharasu's father
Ilavarasu as Tamizharasu's father's friend
Riyaz Khan as ACP Gowrishankar
Visu as Vishwanath Reddy, former High Court Judge current Governor of Tamil Nadu
Nizhalgal Ravi as Vijayaraghavan IPS, the Chennai City Police Commissioner
Shanthi Williams as Governor's wife
T. P. Gajendran as a Madman

MovieInfo:
Directed by T. P. Gajendran
Produced by Mid Valley
Story by Udayakrishna-Siby K. Thomas
Starring Prasanna
Sheela
Vadivelu
Livingston
Manivannan
Riyaz Khan
Delhi Ganesh
Music by Deva
Cinematography Raja Rajan
Edited by N. Ganesh
Production
company 
Mid Valley Entertainment
Release date 
7 September 2007

snippet.title: Aloka & Asiri - Ravana (රාවණ) | Blind Auditions | The Voice Sri Lanka
snippet.description:
The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice One of the most successful reality TV formats in the world. Extremely successful in 180 countries. 
SRI LANKA’S NEWEST TELEVISION EXPERIENCE - The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice is an international reality television singing competition franchise of Dutch origin. It is based on the reality singing competition The Voice of Holland, which was originally created by Dutch television producer John de Mol. The show's format features five stages of competition: producers' auditions, blind auditions, battle rounds, knockouts (since 2012), and live performance shows.

A combined 438 singers have won The Voice, The Voice Kids, The Voice Teens and The Voice Senior in 145 countries/regions. Each winner is given a recording contract, a monetary prize, and a title as that nation's "Voice". 

Official Facebook Page - https://www.facebook.com/TheVoiceSriLankaOfficial
Official Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/thevoicesrilanka
Subscribe Sirasa TV on Youtube : https://bit.ly/3sCpWEz

snippet.title: 28 PARENTING HACKS From Crafty Moms And Dads || Tips for Being Friends with Your Child
snippet.description:
Tips and tricks every parent will be thankful for. 

Being a parent isn’t an easy task, and most of the time, parents come across more problems than they can solve. Well, to help you out, I wanted to share with you some amazing hacks that will save you time and the hassle that comes with taking care of a little one. Painting is everyone’s favorite activity, but it can be very messy — and clothes get destroyed. So, to keep your little one’s outfit nice and clean, use a plastic bag as an apron for them. Toddlers tend to drop their pacifiers all the time, and once the pacifier is down, it needs to be cleaned. To prevent that from happening, tie the pacifier on a balloon. You can use a closet organizer and label it for each day of the week to make sure that picking outfits for the day won’t take hours. Watch until the end to discover all the genius parenting hacks you need to know.

snippet.title: Simran Blockbuster Full HD Movie | Hello Mama Dubbed Movie | Tamil Full Length Movies| Online Movies
snippet.description:
Simran Blockbuster Full HD Movie | Hello Mama Dubbed Movie | Tamil Full Length Movies| Online Movies

Simran Bagga (born Rishibhala Naval; 4 April 1976), known mononymously as Simran, is an Indian film actress, producer, classical dancer, model and television personality. She has predominantly appeared in Tamil and Telugu films, as well as a few films in Hindi, Malayalam and Kannada. She is well noted for her dancing and acting skills in the Indian film industry. In her long movie career, she has won three Filmfare Awards South, one Tamil Nadu State Film Award for Best Actress, three Cinema Express Awards, two Kalaimamani Awards, several regional awards and nominations.

Although Simran initially aspired to become a fashion designer, she accepted offers to join the Indian film industry, which came as a result of her fame as an anchor in the show Superhit Muqabla. Having acted in a few Hindi films, she later achieved her first success with Tere Mere Sapne (1996) alongside Arshad Warsi. Subsequently, she made her debut in South Indian cinema through the Malayalam film Indraprastham (1996) and Kannada film Simhada Mari (1997). The same year, she debuted in Tamil through V. I. P. (1997) and was followed by a string of commercial successes in her early career. In 1999, Simran received critical praise in the Tamil films Thulladha Manamum Thullum (1999) and Vaali (1999), establishing herself as the most successful actress in Tamil cinema at the time. At the peak of her career she agreed to play the role of an antagonist in Parthen Rasithen (2000) and a suffering woman from a premarital agreement in Priyamaanavale (2000), both went on to become commercial and critical successes.

Simran received her first Filmfare Award for Best Tamil Actress for Kannathil Muthamittal (2002),[3] as the mother of an adopted 9-year-old daughter. Simran had also appeared in two comedy films alongside Kamal Haasan; Pammal K. Sambandam and Panchathantiram, both released in 2002. In Telugu, Simran starred in a series of commercially successful films; Samarasimha Reddy (1999), Kalisundam Raa (2000) and Narasimha Naidu (2001), and for latter both, she received Filmfare Award for Best Telugu Actress nomination. Simran left the film industry following her marriage with her childhood family friend Deepak Bagga in 2004.[4] In 2008, she made a comeback to Tamil cinema with Vaaranam Aayiram, where she played a mother and a wife to the characters played by Suriya and won the Filmfare Award for Best Supporting Actress.[5]

snippet.title: Godzilla vs. Kong – Official Trailer
snippet.description:
In theaters and streaming exclusively on @HBOMax* March 26.
 
*Available on @HBOMax in the US only, for 31 days, at no extra cost to subscribers.

https://www.godzillavskong.com/
https://www.facebook.com/GodzillaVsKong
https://www.instagram.com/godzillavskong/
https://twitter.com/GodzillaVsKong

---

From Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures comes the long-awaited face-off between two icons, “Godzilla vs. Kong,” the next epic adventure in Legendary’s cinematic Monsterverse, directed by Adam Wingard.

Legends collide in “Godzilla vs. Kong” as these mythic adversaries meet in a spectacular battle for the ages, with the fate of the world hanging in the balance.  Kong and his protectors undertake a perilous journey to find his true home, and with them is Jia, a young orphaned girl with whom he has formed a unique and powerful bond.  But they unexpectedly find themselves in the path of an enraged Godzilla, cutting a swath of destruction across the globe.  The epic clash between the two titans—instigated by unseen forces—is only the beginning of the mystery that lies deep within the core of the Earth.

The film stars Alexander Skarsgård (“Big Little Lies,” “The Little Drummer Girl”), Millie Bobby Brown (“Stranger Things”), Rebecca Hall (“Christine,” “Professor Marston and the Wonder Women”), Brian Tyree Henry (“Joker,” “Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse”), Shun Oguri (“Weathering with You”), Eiza González (“Fast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & Shaw”), Julian Dennison (“Deadpool 2”), with Kyle Chandler (“Godzilla: King of the Monsters”) and Demián Bichir (“The Nun,” “The Hateful Eight”).
Wingard (“The Guest,” “You’re Next”) directed from a screenplay by Eric Pearson (“Thor: Ragnarok”) and Max Borenstein (“Godzilla: King of the Monsters,” “Kong: Skull Island”), story by Terry Rossio (“Pirates of the Caribbean: Dead Men Tell No Tales”) and Michael Dougherty & Zach Shields (“Godzilla: King of the Monsters”), based on the character “Godzilla” owned and created by TOHO CO., LTD.  The film was produced by Mary Parent, Alex Garcia, Eric McLeod, Jon Jashni, Thomas Tull and Brian Rogers, with Jay Ashenfelter, Herbert W. Gains, Dan Lin, Roy Lee, Yoshimitsu Banno and Kenji Okuhira executive producing.

The director’s behind-the-scenes creative team included director of photography Ben Seresin (“The Mummy,” “World War Z”), production designers Owen Paterson (“Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle,” “Godzilla”) and Thomas S. Hammock (“Blair Witch”), editor Josh Schaeffer (“Godzilla: King of the Monsters”), costume designer Ann Foley (“Skyscraper”) and visual effects supervisor John “DJ” DesJardin (upcoming “Zack Snyder’s Justice League”).

Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures Present a Legendary Pictures Production, A Film By Adam Wingard, “Godzilla vs. Kong.”  The film will be released nationwide in 2D and 3D in select theaters and IMAX on March 26, 2021 and will be available in the U.S. on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.  It is rated PG-13 for intense sequences of creature violence/destruction and brief language.

Hammock (“Blair Witch”), editor Josh Schaeffer (“Godzilla: King of the Monsters”), costume designer Ann Foley (“Skyscraper”) and visual effects supervisor John “DJ” DesJardin (upcoming “Zack Snyder’s Justice League”).

Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures Present a Legendary Pictures Production, A Film By Adam Wingard, “Godzilla vs. Kong.”  The film will be released nationwide in 2D and 3D in select theaters and IMAX on March 26, 2021 and will be available in the U.S. on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.  It is rated PG-13 for intense sequences of creature violence/destruction and brief language.
